channel.title: WBS on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in WBS on RaihnForge

item.title: Master Project Management Plan: Nurse Workstation Refresh
item.description:
Notional client project. “Central Medical Center” and “Dr. Phylicia Patterson” are fictional names from the assignment brief. The project mechanics, schedule, WBS, and management plans below are my own applied work, presented here lightly edited from the cumulative course deliverable.

Introduction

The Nurse Workstation Refresh Phase 1 is a technology refresh necessary to maintain high quality standards, reduce future maintenance costs, increase security, and increase efficiency for the stakeholders of Central Medical Center. Conducting Phase 1 of the greater initiative will begin the facility-wide refresh, prioritizing increased quality to areas that represent the first-line interaction with clients. 101 nurse workstations on floors 3, 4, and 5 will be updated to Windows 10. This document captures the costs, timelines, and scope necessary to achieve project success, with the clarity in their concept, execution, and control that the organization expects.

item.title: Project Management Plan: Nurse Workstation Technology Refresh — Phase 1
item.description:
Notional client project. “Central Medical Center” and “Dr. Phylicia Patterson” are fictional names from the assignment brief. The project mechanics, schedule, WBS, budget framework, and management plans below are my own applied work, presented here lightly edited from the cumulative ADMG 474 course deliverable. Tables, budget figures, and matrix attachments are referenced in the original but not reproduced in this web view.

Introduction

The Nurse Workstation Refresh Phase 1 is a technology refresh that is necessary to maintain high quality standards, reduce future maintenance costs, increase security, and increase efficiency for the stakeholders of Central Medical Center. Conducting Phase 1 of the greater initiative will begin the facility-wide refresh, prioritizing increased quality to areas that represent our first-line interaction with clients. 101 nurse workstations on floors 3, 4, and 5 will be updated to the more current operating system, Windows 10. Included in this document are details in support of a clear understanding of constraints for Nurse Workstation Refresh Phase 1. Costs, timelines, and scope are crucial elements of achieving project success. The clarity in their concept, execution, and control are a priority and this document communicates the understanding of each within the organization.
